name: activates per-namespace probe groups only for the namespaces the workload puts in scope
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a simple React website UI dashboard" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]; exit(c["activated_probe_namespaces"].include?("react") && !c["namespaces"].include?("k8s") ? 0:1)' && echo frontend-scoped-not-k8s 1>&2
